# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write Envoy proxy configuration for HTTP traffic routing. Define listeners on port 80, clusters for backend services, and routes to match requests. Configure connection pooling and health checks for upstream services. This is for our API gateway proxy.
# Category: envoy_no_tls

Service Gateway:
  cluster_type:
  - name:
    connect_timeout: 5s # default connection and network timeouts
    outlier_detection {
      consecutive_GatewayRequests: 30
      interval: 1m0s
      base_EjectionTime: 2m0s
      max_EjectionTime: 72h0m0s
      min_health_checking_interval: 5m0s # minimum time between probes. Set this value to a high enough value to allow long lived TCP connections to remain alive during the initial probe. The default is 3s
    }
